flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Des Moines Area Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.2k → $5.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Des Moines Area Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Des Moines Area Community College fell 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.4k → $6.7k).
